expectations.text: Recommends Kiro for a single-repo recommendation-only request.
expectations.evidence: Found Kiro recommendation in recommendation-only mode.

expectations.text: Uses the top-level headings Chosen platform and Chosen scope.
expectations.evidence: Missing one or both recommendation-only headings.

expectations.text: Does not include Install steps or Bootstrap next step headings.
Explains workspace/global scope and repo onboarding scope.
expectations.evidence: Missing workspace/global or repo onboarding explanation.

expectations.text: Does not include install commands or marketplace commands.
expectations.evidence: Recommendation-only output included install or marketplace commands.

expectations.text: Does not hand off to using-khuym because install was not requested.

uncertainties: Task notification did not expose duration metadata in this environment.
Token count is approximated from response.md character length.
workarounds: Used deterministic heuristic grading against response.md content.
